Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Jrk Hotel Group, Inc. To Respond To Form And Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Stacy Kang of Rencher Law Group, P.C. telephone number 415-877-4486 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted the tentative rulings as follows:
1) PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYANT'S Unopposed Motion To Compel Defendant JRK Hotel Group, Inc. To Respond To Form And Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents is granted. The request for Sanctions is denied. CCP 2023.040. Order signed.
2) PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYANT'S Motion To Compel Defendant Let It Flho Lessee, Inc. To Respond To Form And Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents is granted. The request for sanctions is denied. CCP 2023.040. Order signed.
3) PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYANT'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Against JRK Hotel Group, Inc. is granted. The request for sanctions is denied. CCP 2023.040. Order signed.
4) PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYANT'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Against Let It Flho Lessee, Inc. And For Sanctions is granted. The request for Sanctions is denied. CCP 2023.040. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
